# Siddharth Pundir

> Personal portfolio, blog, and projects by Siddharth Pundir — a Computer Science student exploring AI, web development, and software engineering.

## Links

- Homepage: https://siddharthpundir.com
- Blog: https://siddharthpundir.com/blog
- Contact: https://siddharthpundir.com/#contact
- RSS Feed: https://siddharthpundir.com/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://siddharthpundir.com/sitemap.xml
- GitHub: https://github.com/Siddharthpundir
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/siddharthpundir

## About

Siddharth Pundir is a Computer Science Engineering student passionate about artificial intelligence, web development, and software engineering. He builds projects in public, writes technical blog posts, and shares his learning journey online.

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- TypeScript
- React 19
- MDX for blog content
- Deployed on Vercel

## Blog Topics

- AI and machine learning
- Web development
- Software engineering
- Developer tools
- Career growth
- Building in public
